texto: No matter the languages we speak or the colour of our skin, we share ancestors who planted rice on the banks of the Yangtze, who first domesticated horses on the steppes of the Ukraine, who hunted giant sloths in the forests of North and South America, and who laboured to build the Great Pyramid of Khufu.
explicacao: Citação de Adam Rutherford sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “No matter the languages we speak or the colour of our skin, we share ancestors who planted rice o…” articula reflexao, human-race, humanity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e humanity.
